Aggregation.description: How to aggregate measurement values into a conclusion scalar.

DiffField.description: Either a boolean (uses `<step.name>.patch`) or an explicit patch filename.

ExperimentStepToml.description: A single step in the experiment. The `tool` field selects a forager plugin; remaining fields are passed to the plugin via `FORAGER_INPUTS` as JSON.

apply-diff.description: Apply a patch before running this step. `true` uses `<name>.patch`; a string overrides the filename.

name.description: Step identifier. Also the default patch filename stem when `apply-diff = true`.

tool.description: Forager plugin name (resolves to `forager-<tool>`). Defaults to `exec` if `cmd` is set.

SummaryToml.description: Aggregates a set of measurements into a single scalar tracked for regressions.

bisect.description: Trigger bisection when this summary regresses.

filter.description: Tag key=value filters applied before aggregation.

measurement.description: Measurement name (as emitted by the forager) to aggregate over.

name.description: Summary identifier; surfaced in the dashboard.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the experiment measures.

name.description: Experiment name. Should match the directory name.

steps.description: Ordered list of forager steps. Patches are cumulative across steps.

summaries.description: Named scalars derived from measurements, used for regression detection.
